description: Every AutoTempest car-search source in your terminal, with a local store, cross-source VIN dedupe, and price-drop tracking no AutoTempest tool has.

required_headers.name: User-Agent
required_headers.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/149.0 Safari/537.36

tools.name: makes_list
tools.description: List makes. Use the returned slug (e.g. 'honda') as the --make value for find. Optional: popular (default: true). Returns the MakesResponse.

tools.name: models_list
tools.description: List models for a make. Pass the make slug (e.g. 'honda'); use the returned model slug as --model for find. Required: make. Optional: popular (default: true). Returns the ModelsResponse.
